clusters.title: All eyes on Hanson for Press Club address
clusters.neutral_headline: All eyes on Hanson for Press Club address
bullet_summary: Reported by Crikey, ABC News Australia, The Age and others

items.title: All eyes on Hanson for Press Club address
items.standfirst: As her party continues to surge in the polls, One Nation leader Pauline Hanson is set to come under scrutiny during her National Press address in Canberra. Meanwhile, Donald Trump remains vague on what is actually in his Iran deal. The post All eyes on Hanson for Press Club address appeared first on Crikey.
items.content: As her party continues to surge in the polls, One Nation leader Pauline Hanson is set to come under scrutiny during her National Press address in Canberra. Meanwhile, Donald Trump remains vague on what is actually in his Iran deal. The post All eyes on Hanson for Press Club address appeared first on Crikey.
